case_title: HANSON, LOUISA vs. CHUMPITAZ, ENRIQUE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHUMPITAZ, ENRIQUE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3385-22ND ST, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $2,400.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,400.00, LEASE FORFEITED, $900.60 FOR PER DIEM DAMAGES AND COSTS PER COST BILL.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHUMPITAZ, ENRIQUE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $20.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HANSON, LOUISA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HANSON, LOUISA AS TO DEFENDANT CHUMPITAZ, ENRIQUE DOES I TO X SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT CHUMPITAZ, ENRIQUE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHUMPITAZ, ENRIQUE
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF HANSON, LOUISA HEARING SET FOR SEP-15-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER, CALENDAR OF SEP-15-1993, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT, GAETANI DECLARATION PARAGRAPHS 3-8.
ORDER GRANTING SUMMARY JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF
